title: Physiotherapist - Adults (Full-time/Part-time/Locum)
description:
About THK Therapy Services (TS)

THK Therapy Services (TS) provides Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, and Speech and Language Therapy to THKMC programmes and other community partners. We adopt a holistic, client- and family-centred care approach, working closely with multidisciplinary teams, families, and caregivers.


As a therapy hub, our therapists support a wide range of client profiles and may be deployed across different services based on organisational needs.


About the Role

We are seeking Physiotherapists (Adults) to join our allied health team. You will be supporting adults with physical, functional, and mobility needs in THK’s disability homes, day activity centres, day rehabilitation centres, and home-based therapy services, among other community-based initiatives.


Therapists may be deployed across various adult-focused programmes depending on service requirements.


Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct assessments and provide physiotherapy interventions for adult clients with mobility, neurological, functional, and physical rehabilitation needs.
  • Develop and implement Individualised Care Plans (ICPs), working collaboratively with caregivers, nursing, and other allied health professionals.
  • Deliver therapy through individual or group sessions in centre-based or community-based settings, including home visits when required.
  • Provide education and training to caregivers and staff to promote safe mobility and functional independence for clients.
  • Participate in multidisciplinary case discussions to contribute to holistic care planning for adult clients.

Professional Development Opportunities

  • Access to clinical supervision, mentorship, and ongoing professional development.
  • Opportunities to work alongside experienced therapists and multidisciplinary teams supporting adults across a wide range of physical, intellectual, and sensory disabilities.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Physiotherapy.
  • Fully registered or eligible for registration with the Allied Health Professions Council (AHPC), Singapore.
  • Passion for working with adults in residential, community, or home-based settings.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication, and collaboration skills.
  • At least 4-5 years of relevant experience in adult physiotherapy .

Join Us

Be part of THK Therapy Services, where your work helps adults maximise their physical potential, independence, and quality of life. Make a meaningful impact in the community with us.

postedCompany.description:
THYE HUA KWAN MORAL CHARITIES LIMITED


THKMC was incorporated on 13 October 2011 as a charity to provide multiple social and welfare services to the community at large, and achieved an Institute of Public Character (IPC) status on 18 November 2011. THKMC is the charitable arm of Thye Hua Kwan Moral Society, which lives by the mission – To Serve Mankind – to help anyone who needs help regardless of their race, religion, colour, language, creed and culture. THKMC today serves more than 70,000 beneficiaries through more than 70 programmes across five Services, which include Disability, Early Intervention for Children, Family, Seniors’ Community, and Therapy.
